commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh You shall eat, but not be satisfied; and hunger shall be in your midst; and you shall carry away, but shall not save; and that which you save will I give up to the sword. Septuagint, "I will cast thee away into thyself. "(Haydock) Hold of some fruit. (Calmet) Thy wife shall miscarry; (Vatable) or if she bring forth, the children shall perish by the sword. Septuagint, "grave. "(Haydock) "It is good for thee, when thou knowest thy error, to have no disciples.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
